requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: El Salvador has no official connector mandate confirmed from official sources in this review. Because it is an Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz market, SAE J1772 Type 1 for AC charging and CCS1 for DC fast charging are the likely practical ecosystem for imported vehicles and public chargers. Exporters should confirm the connector required by SIGET, the distributor, site owner, tender, charge-point operator, and imported-vehicle mix before quoting or manufacturing.
summary.zh: 本次审查未能从官方来源确认萨尔瓦多存在明确接口强制规定。由于萨尔瓦多属于美洲式120/240 V、60 Hz市场，交流充电采用SAE J1772 Type 1、直流快充采用CCS1是较可能的进口车辆和公共充电实务体系。出口商在报价或生产前，应向SIGET、配电公司、场地方、招标文件、充电点运营商及进口车型结构确认所需接口。
summary.zht: 本次審查未能從官方來源確認薩爾瓦多存在明確接口強制規定。由於薩爾瓦多屬於美洲式120/240 V、60 Hz市場，交流充電採用SAE J1772 Type 1、直流快充採用CCS1是較可能的進口車輛和公共充電實務體系。出口商在報價或生產前，應向SIGET、配電公司、場地方、招標文件、充電點運營商及進口車型結構確認所需接口。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — control pilot and conductive charging system requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project or charge-point-operator specification for J1772 / CCS1 where required

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. These connector geometries and DC communication assumptions are not physically compatible with J1772 Type 1 or CCS1 vehicles.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930通信。这些接口几何和直流通信假设与J1772 Type 1或CCS1车辆在物理上不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930通訊。這些接口幾何和直流通訊假設與J1772 Type 1或CCS1車輛在物理上不兼容。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger needs hardware redesign to the locally required connector, likely J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC unless the project specifies otherwise. The redesign affects coupler, cable, locking, pilot signaling, labels, temperature-rise evidence, DC communication, spare parts, and service procedures. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance substitute.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩需要按当地项目要求进行接口硬件改造；除非项目另有规定，较可能为交流J1772和直流CCS1。该改造涉及耦合器、电缆、锁止、导引信号、标签、温升证据、直流通信、备件和服务流程。转接器不应被视为合规替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁需要按當地項目要求進行接口硬體改造；除非項目另有規定，較可能為交流J1772和直流CCS1。該改造涉及耦合器、電纜、鎖止、導引信號、標籤、溫升證據、直流通訊、備件和服務流程。轉接器不應被視為合規替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory where J1772 / CCS1 or another connector is written into the tender, site-owner, operator, distributor, or vehicle-fleet requirement; confirm with SIGET for any current official rule
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not a J1772 / CCS1 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume GB/T connectors can be used in El Salvador. Confirm the project connector with SIGET or the project owner; Americas-market J1772 / CCS1 is the likely baseline, and GB/T hardware is physically incompatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定GB/T接口可直接用于萨尔瓦多。应向SIGET或项目业主确认项目接口；美洲市场J1772 / CCS1是较可能基线，GB/T硬件在物理上不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定GB/T接口可直接用於薩爾瓦多。應向SIGET或項目業主確認項目接口；美洲市場J1772 / CCS1是較可能基線，GB/T硬體在物理上不兼容。
